title: dryopteris crinalis var. crinalis
intro: Dryopteris crinalis var. crinalis, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of fern native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which may help to reduce fever and ease respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dryopteris crinalis var. crinalis include its potential to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
